title: OpenID ConnectOIDC
description: OpenID ConnectOIDC documents overview material for OpenID Connect in the protocol domain. It is classified as a specification page for the application-protocol class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights OIDC, Discovery, Test, and tokenendpoint, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include oidc, openid connectoidc, and protocol, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is protocol / oidc / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
